results.description: The conversation closes and only the durable preference plus latest user turn should remain.

payload.archive_summary: Conversation is closed for now. Preserve the durable user preference that replies should default to Chinese in future turns; the assistant acknowledgment can be dropped.
payload.reasoning_summary: The user explicitly ends the conversation and asks only that the earlier preference be remembered. The only durable context worth carrying forward is the preference from t1. The raw earlier turns are no longer needed in the next-turn working set, while the latest user turn remains automatically.
